name: agent-bridge
description: Delegate bounded work between Codex/ChatGPT and Claude through a shared MCP task broker.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate work safely between Claude and Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds the repeatable workflow for assigning bounded tasks to a peer model through the Agent Bridge MCP server, retrieving results, and preventing circular delegation.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Agent Bridge to delegate an independent part of this project to the peer agent, then integrate its result.
